closest_to_camera: Which option describes the small 3D object closest to the camera?
From the camera view, which option describes the nearest small object?
Using the perspective depth cues, choose the option for the small object closest to the camera.
Which option describes the small shape closest to the viewer?
Among the candidate objects in the scene, which option is nearest to the camera?
farthest_from_camera: Which option describes the small 3D object farthest from the camera?

Using the perspective depth cues, choose the option for the small object farthest from the camera.
Which option describes the small shape farthest from the viewer?
Among the candidate objects in the scene, which option is farthest from the camera?
closest_marked_point: Which marked floor point is closest to the camera?

Using the perspective depth cues, choose the marked floor point closest to the camera.
Among the lettered floor point markers, which one is closest to the viewer?
Which letter marks the floor point with the smallest camera distance?
farthest_marked_point: Which marked floor point is farthest from the camera?

Using the perspective depth cues, choose the marked floor point farthest from the camera.

directly_above_reference: Which lettered point is directly above the {reference_name} in 3D space?
Choose the marked point that is vertically above the {reference_name}.
Which letter marks the point directly over the {reference_name}?
Which point marker is aligned above the {reference_name} along the vertical direction?
Find the point directly above the {reference_name}. Which letter is it?
point_on_object_line: Which marked point lies on the line connecting the {reference_a_name} and the {reference_b_name}?
Choose the marked point aligned with the {reference_a_name} and the {reference_b_name}.
Which letter marks the point on the line through the {reference_a_name} and the {reference_b_name}?
Find the marked point that lines up with the {reference_a_name} and the {reference_b_name}.
Which marked point is collinear with the {reference_a_name} and the {reference_b_name}?
left_of_directed_line: Which marked point is on the left side of the line from the {reference_a_name} to the {reference_b_name}?
From the {reference_a_name} toward the {reference_b_name}, which marked point is on the left side?
Choose the marked point left of the directed line from the {reference_a_name} to the {reference_b_name}.
Which point marker falls to the left of the line from the {reference_a_name} to the {reference_b_name}?
Looking from the {reference_a_name} to the {reference_b_name}, which marked point is left of the line?
right_of_directed_line: Which marked point is on the right side of the line from the {reference_a_name} to the {reference_b_name}?
From the {reference_a_name} toward the {reference_b_name}, which marked point is on the right side?
Choose the marked point right of the directed line from the {reference_a_name} to the {reference_b_name}.
Which point marker falls to the right of the line from the {reference_a_name} to the {reference_b_name}?
Looking from the {reference_a_name} to the {reference_b_name}, which marked point is right of the line?
reference_triangle_inside: Which marked point is inside the triangle formed by the {reference_a_name}, the {reference_b_name}, and the {reference_c_name}?
Choose the marked point inside the triangle made by the {reference_a_name}, the {reference_b_name}, and the {reference_c_name}.
Which letter marks the point inside the triangle formed by the {reference_a_name}, the {reference_b_name}, and the {reference_c_name}?

Which point marker lies inside the triangle formed by the {reference_a_name}, the {reference_b_name}, and the {reference_c_name}?
camera_distance_order: Which option orders the marked points from nearest to farthest from the camera?
Choose the option listing the marked points from closest to farthest from the camera.
Which option gives the marked-point order from nearest to farthest?
Using the depth cues, choose the option that orders the marked points from nearest to farthest.
Which option lists the marked points in increasing distance from the camera?

occludes_reference: Which object blocks part of the {reference_name}?

highest_above_floor: Among the listed options, which object is sitting highest above the floor?

lowest_above_floor: Among the listed options, which object is sitting lowest above the floor?

global.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.

task:camera_distance_extremum_query.object_description: a perspective 3D platform scene with several small objects and larger props
task:camera_distance_extremum_query.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] bounding box around the selected small object in the scene
task:camera_distance_extremum_query.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected option letter

task:marked_point_depth_extremum_query.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected marked-point letter
